override_justification: Weight prefetch (VAL-BW-001/002/003) was investigated and found architecturally incompatible with gfx906. Async memory operations during allreduce corrupt P2P BAR1 transfers. All approaches tested (self-copy, scratch buffer) cause memory corruption (cosine_sim 0.58-0.85). Assertions removed from validation contract with user approval. VAL-CROSS-001 deferred to speculative-tree milestone.
